name: Arman Hossain
bio: Met in BUET during freshman year. We used to pull all-nighters before exams. Now he works at a startup in Dhaka.

name: Nadia Rahman
bio: My first manager at the job. She taught me how to communicate with clients. Still meet for coffee every few weeks.

name: Sabbir Ahmed
bio: Grew up on the same street in Chittagong. We played cricket every afternoon. He moved to Sylhet for work two years ago.

name: Tania Islam
bio: We were in the same study group for three semesters. She is now doing her masters in Canada and we keep in touch over video calls.

name: Rifat Karim
bio: Met at the gym three years ago. We motivate each other to stay consistent. Also share a passion for cooking and try new recipes together.

name: Mehnaz Begum
bio: Our families have known each other for decades. She is like an older sister to me. Life got busy and we drifted but I want to reconnect.

name: Tanvir Chowdhury
bio: Sat next to me for two years at the office. We bonded over a shared hatred of Monday meetings. He recently switched to a remote job.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Met on a group trip to Cox's Bazar and we have been inseparable ever since. We plan at least one trip together every year.
